nasb.text: if a spirit of jealousy comes over him and he is jealous of his wife when she has defiled herself, or if a spirit of jealousy comes over him and he is jealous of his wife when she has not defiled herself,

esv.text: and if the spirit of jealousy comes over him and he is jealous of his wife who has defiled herself, or if the spirit of jealousy comes over him and he is jealous of his wife, though she has not defiled herself,

cnv.text: 如果她的丈夫生了疑心，疑忌妻子，而妻子實在是被玷污了；又或者丈夫生了疑心，疑忌妻子，而妻子並沒有被玷污，
